overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious cyberpunk apartment interior from a video game, featuring neon pink and cyan lighting, a central holographic art installation, and minimalist modern furniture. The camera slowly moves through the living space into a bedroom area with a large platform bed.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic living room with central holographic display

events.description: camera approaches the glowing holographic tower in the center of the room

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through the minimalist living room toward the holographic display

entered.detail: modern white sectional sofa with clean lines on the left side of the room
matching white sectional sofa on the right side facing the center
tall stack of glowing cyan cubes emitting light from a base on the floor
horizontal pink neon light strip mounted on the right wall
floor-to-ceiling glass partition with vertical blinds at the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, luxurious cyberpunk living room illuminated by pink and cyan neon lights. Two white sofas frame a central holographic tower made of floating glowing cubes. The camera moves slowly forward across the polished dark floor toward this centerpiece.

events.description: camera circles around the holographic tower, revealing the bedroom area behind it

agents.ego_description: circling around the holographic display to view it from different angles while moving toward the bedroom

entered.detail: abstract red neon light sculpture mounted on the left wall
large white platform bed with illuminated base visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the glowing holographic tower, revealing red neon wall art on the left. As it moves, the platform bed becomes visible in the background, and the initial sofas recede from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom area with platform bed and scattered clothing

events.description: camera enters the bedroom area, passing the holographic display and approaching the platform bed

agents.ego_description: moving into the bedroom area and approaching the large white platform bed with scattered clothes on the floor

entered.detail: scattered pile of clothes and fabric on the dark floor near the bed
vertical pink neon light strip illuminating the corner behind the bed
white pillows and rumpled bedding on the platform bed

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the bedroom area, leaving the main living space behind. The platform bed dominates the view with its white bedding and scattered clothes on the floor. A vertical pink neon light glows in the corner behind the bed.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate bedroom space close to the platform bed

events.description: camera moves closely around the bed, examining the bedding details, then turns back toward the main room

agents.ego_description: circling closely around the platform bed to examine the details, then turning to face back toward the living area

entered.detail: close-up view of the textured white comforter and pillows on the bed

segments.scene_description: The camera moves intimately close to the platform bed, showing detailed textures of the white bedding, then slowly turns to reveal the holographic tower and living area visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk living space that gradually transitions into an intimate bedroom area. It begins by gliding across a polished dark floor toward a central holographic tower of floating glowing cubes, framed by white sofas and bathed in pink and cyan light. As the camera circles the centerpiece, the initial seating recedes and red neon wall art emerges on the left, while a platform bed slowly comes into view in the background. The scene then shifts into the bedroom area, where the focus moves past scattered clothes on the floor toward the white bedding and a vertical pink neon glow in the corner. Finally, the camera draws intimately close to the textures of the bed before turning back to reveal the holographic tower and living area receding into the distance.
